title: The UK needs more North Sea gas, not greater reliance on US imports
description: Transition to a cleaner future takes time and we need supplies that are the least polluting and have the lowest cost
content:
Terrific news: despite turmoil in the strait of Hormuz, the UK will have sufficient supplies of gas to meet demand this summer, said National Gas, which operates the gas transmission system, on Monday.
But contain your relief. The summer months of lo... [4941 chars]

title: Oasis, Iron Maiden and Sade among record number of Brits entering Rock & Roll Hall of Fame
description: Sade, Phil Collins, Billy Idol and Joy Division/New Order are also among the recipients.
content:
A record number of British performers are to be inducted into the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame this year, with Oasis, heavy metal legends Iron Maiden and Sade amongst those voted in.
The total of six British acts out of eight inductees includes Mancheste... [6143 chars]

title: Man faces attempted murder charges in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
description: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
content:
A Texas man accused of throwing a Molotov cocktail at the San Francisco home of OpenAI boss Sam Altman is facing multiple state charges, including two counts of attempted murder.
Daniel Moreno-Gama is scheduled to hear those charges at an arraignment... [3542 chars]

title: Harry and Meghan: Sussexes arrive in Australia for four-day tour
description: It is the couple's first visit to Australia since 2018 when they were working royals.
content:
The Duke and Duchess of Sussex have arrived in Australia for a four-day tour which will see them combine visits to charitable causes alongside private, money-making engagements.
The couple - no longer working royals and visiting in a private capacity... [4648 chars]

title: Lebanon enters talks with Israel but with no cards to play
description: The Lebanese government go into peace talks with limited influence over the group.
content:
With Lebanon, again, engulfed by war, I remember a meeting I had with President Joseph Aoun at the Baabda Palace, a modernist building at the top of a hill overlooking Beirut last August.
